info.title: EKS Health Checker
info.description: Checks health status of an project eks including node groups, deployments, and pod restarts

get.description: Checks the health of an project eks — cluster status, node group health, unhealthy or scaled-down deployments, and crashing pods. Use this when the user asks if services are running, if pods are healthy, if anything is down, or for a general system health check. Default cluster is project-eks and default namespace is eks.

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: project-eks name to check. Defaults to project-eks.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Kubernetes namespace to check deployments and pods in. Defaults to eks.
